def positive_list_of_keys_materialized_for_membership_check():
    rule_id = "list_of_keys_materialized_for_membership_check"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that builds list(mapping.keys()) before checking membership."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
